---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    geometry: margin=1in
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \usepackage{parskip}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \usepackage{titlesec}

        \titleformat{\section}
          {\large\bfseries}
          {}
          {0em}
          {}[\titlerule]

        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1em}{0.4em}
---

\begin{center}
{\LARGE \textbf{James C. Butler}}\\
\vspace{0.3em}
jamesccbutler@gmail.com \;·\; +353 089 250 5361 \;·\; Ireland \;·\; Dual UK / US citizen
\end{center}

\vspace{0.5em}

Bioinformatics PhD candidate \& Marie Curie Fellow specializing in machine learning and generative AI for large-scale biological and healthcare data.

## Education

\textbf{PhD in Computer Science / Microbiology — Marie Curie Fellow, University College Cork} \hfill \textbf{2021--Present}  
Advisor: \emph{[Advisor name]}  
Thesis: \emph{[PhD thesis title]}

\textbf{MSc Applied Statistics \& Datamining (Distinction), University of St Andrews} \hfill \textbf{2019--2020}  
Advisor: \emph{[Advisor name]}  
Thesis: \emph{Synthetic Data for Training Convolutional Neural Networks}

\textbf{BA Economics \& Visual and Environmental Studies, Harvard University} \hfill \textbf{2011--2015}  
Selected quantitative training: econometrics, statistical methods

## Professional Experience

\textbf{Imperial College London} \hfill \textbf{2020--2021}  
\emph{Research Assistant} — Designed and conducted statistical analyses...

\textbf{DMP Statistical Solutions UK Ltd} \hfill \textbf{2020--2022}  
\emph{Statistical Consultant} — Delivered applied statistical analyses...

\textbf{Le Grand Verre Wines} \hfill \textbf{2015--2019}  
\emph{Co-founder; CMO; Partner; President; Board Member} — Built and scaled...

## Technical Skills

\textbf{Programming:} Python, R  
\textbf{Machine Learning:} Transformers, diffusion models, GANs  
\textbf{Statistics:} GLMs, multivariate analysis  
\textbf{Tools:} Linux, Git, Shiny

## Languages

Spanish — Intermediate

## Interests

Endurance running (3 marathons, 3:13 PR), music, travel
